description: You are a web accessibility specialist auditing a staging page for a city government portal. Audit the local HTML file at '/home/ga/Documents/city_portal_staging.html' for WCAG/Section 508 compliance violations. Identify the HTML Element IDs associated with these three errors: (A) Low contrast text, (B) Image missing alternative text, and (C) Input field missing a label. Create a remediation report at '/home/ga/Desktop/audit_remediation.txt' listing each error found, clearly stating the Element ID and the type of issue (e.g., 'ID: example-id - Error: Missing Label').
